title: Leviathan: The Story of Hellraiser and Hellbound: Hellraiser II
original_title: Leviathan: The Story of Hellraiser and Hellbound: Hellraiser II
overview: Leviathan: The Story of Hellraiser and Hellbound: Hellraiser II is a feature length documentary uncovering the history and the making of Clive Barker's Hellraiser and Hellbound: Hellraiser II films.
